oai_dc:dc.dc:title: A Message from the President
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: LePage, Mary Ellen
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 3 (July 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.The House of Delegates has voted, and, after September, AFA’s President will be Lewis (Buddy) Waskey. I wish him well and will aid him with the transition.At the AFA Conference in Dallas, the House of Delegates will be offered Bylaw changes that will protect the future of the American Federation of Aviculture. I plead with you, our Delegates, to pass these very important Bylaw Changes.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 3 (2023): Watchbird July 2023; 3
